mentions.note: Down 45% YTD, 65% in 12 months. Q missed, guidance dismal: North America same-store sales down 5–6%, expected low double-digit declines next Q. Margin pressure, tariffs, product refresh needed. Trades 10x forward earnings (vs. 30x historical). Bubble burst from pandemic demand pull-forward, explosive competition (Alo, Hoka, Nike, Adidas), style shift to baggier denim, lost pricing power. May be worth a look at much lower levels, not here.
Reports Thursday; turmoil at company makes beating estimates hard to believe; this is reset quarter—don't buy ahead of reset quarters.
